name: Steady
description: After a unit that has the Steady keyword makes a Move action during its Activation, it may make a free Attack action. Only Ranged weapons can be added to Attack Pools during this Attack action.
official_rules_text: After a unit that has the Steady keyword makes a Move action during its Activation, it may make a free Attack action. Only Ranged weapons can be added to Attack Pools during this Attack action.
